desc: Phase 6 Command: Copies levels from a linked architectural model to the host MEP model.
summary: Phase 6 Command: Copies levels from a linked architectural model to the host MEP model. Uses CopyMonitorLevels with primary level logic (500mm tolerance) to avoid duplicates. Gets available links via SearchInsideCurrentModel.GetAllLinks. Called by SheetSetUpCommand during automated sheet setup. Related: CreateFloorplanCommand (create floor plan on copied level).
usecase: User wants to copy levels from the architectural model into their MEP model. User is setting up a new MEP model and needs matching levels from the architect.
notfor: Creating levels manually (use Revit native level tool). Copying levels between two host models (only linked → host).
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one Revit link must be loaded containing levels.
postcondition: Primary levels from the linked model are created in the host model. Clashing levels (within 500mm) and non-primary levels (mezzanines) are skipped.

successprompts: Level sync complete — {count} primary levels added
Done! Levels are now in your MEP model
